game.name: Chrono Trigger
game.desc: The Android version of Chrono Trigger, run natively via the ct_nx loader. A time-spanning JRPG by Square: a band of heroes travels across distant eras to stop a cataclysm born of the creature Lavos. Runs the cocos2d-x engine on SDL2 + GLES2 with bundled FFmpeg cutscenes; you supply the game files from your own legally-owned Chrono Trigger Android APK (v2.1.5).
